# We Buy Your Junk INC

> Family-owned scrap metal recycling and junk car buying business in Jackson, Michigan. In operation since 2008. We buy copper, brass, aluminum, steel, junk cars, and all recyclable metals at competitive market prices. Free junk vehicle pickup within Jackson County.

## Services

- [Scrap Metal Buying](https://www.webuyyourjunk.net/scrap): We purchase copper, brass, aluminum, structural steel, stainless steel, lead acid batteries, radiators, and catalytic converters. Prices based on daily commodity markets with certified digital scales.
- [Junk Car Removal](https://www.webuyyourjunk.net/scrap): Free pickup and cash payment for junk vehicles in Jackson County, Michigan. Running or not.
- [Used Auto Parts](https://www.webuyyourjunk.net/used-auto-parts): Quality salvage auto parts at 50-80% below retail. Engines, transmissions, body panels, electrical components, interior parts, and wheels.

## About

- [About Us](https://www.webuyyourjunk.net/about): Three-generation family business founded in 2008 in Jackson, Michigan. Faith-driven operations guided by honesty and community stewardship. Over 100 years combined experience in metal recycling.

## Resources

- [Insights & Blog](https://www.webuyyourjunk.net/insights): Expert articles on scrap metal prices, recycling tips, junk car buying, and industry news from Jackson County's trusted recycling center.
- [Contact & Hours](https://www.webuyyourjunk.net/contact): Located at 2756 E South St, Jackson, MI 49201. Open Monday–Friday 8am–5pm, Saturday 8am–12pm. Phone: (517) 220-6035.

## Business Details

- **Founded**: 2008
- **Location**: 2756 E South St, Jackson, MI 49201
- **Service Area**: Jackson County, Michigan and surrounding 30-mile radius
- **Phone**: (517) 220-6035

- **Slogan**: Junking for Jesus in Jackson
